allow: Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -m alembic revision --autogenerate -m "Agrega tablas de departamentos y categorias")

PowerShell($procId = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique\); if \($procId\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "stopped $procId" } else { Write-Output "already stopped" })
